title: Simple HUD Overlay
description: Simple customizable HUD overlay to display world/player data on the screen.
body:
A simple client side mod that adds a text overlay to display player coordinates, current biome and time.

![Example](https://i.imgur.com/33iaCo1.png)

The displayed text is customizable in the mod settings menu:

![Config menu](https://i.imgur.com/vlrIaYQ.png)
